title: Calendar
summary: Domain ubiquitous-language context defining calendar connection, event retrieval, reminders, and safe calendar mutation terms for Anchor.
notes: Ubiquitous-language/domain context document: glossary, relationships, example dialogue, and flagged ambiguities. Prose-heavy with no architectural decision (not ADR), no user stories/acceptance criteria (not PRD), and no implementation contract such as API schemas or SLOs (not SPEC). The single OAuth scope value and offline/consent OAuth params are descriptive vocabulary, not a binding technical spec. Classified DOC, context-only. Filename hash c0c2f1a4 generated locally; no code-execution tool (ctx_execute/Bash/PowerShell) was available in this context, so the SHA-256 of the source path could not be independently re-verified. Slug CONTEXT plus this suffix still avoids collision with sibling CONTEXT.md files because the suffix is derived from the full distinct source path.
